title: Lifesteal Retake
description: A lifesteal datapack for your SMP!
body:
This datapack add the posibility to steal and gain hearth!
You can modify the config to anything you want about it!

Do the command **/function lifesteal-retake:config** to edit the configuration!

![Image of the config 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f20ab2ddba61252c3b57c1171311399c1472f5ca.png)

You can enable/disable the "Steal people hearth"! when disable when you kill a guy you wont steal his hearth! and enable you will steal his hearth!
![Config 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b298bcaa533be789dd6d27db73a488235c9c20d.png)

You can enable/disable the "Lose hearth when dies"! this config if enabled will remove hearth of the people if he dies by anything!

![Config 3 (yeah it's a lot)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7ac60fca84d2f30e155b22c366978a8ae02d66.png)

You can set the maximum amount of hearth that people can have! but if a guy have max health and kill a guy, _the hearth is lost forever... in the void_

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fedeb1e69c2fe64279f5d098e0b9f44a630830e.png)

In a crafting table, you can craft the beacon of revive! To revive someone, you need to first get an anvil and rename the beacon with the guys name. And click the beacon. And now hes alive!
